title: ScenarioFingerprint
description: Structural signature of a scenario used by the non-repetition engine. Stored append-only in workspace/<campaign>/memory/scenario_fingerprints.jsonl. Two scenarios collide when their similarity (see rubrics/statistics.md) exceeds run-config.scenario_plan.max_repeat_similarity.

source_mix.description: Which target data sources/tools the scenario is designed to exercise.

ambiguity_shape.description: The kind of ambiguity, if any, e.g. 'name-to-entity', 'missing-time-window', 'no-antecedent'.

path_shape.description: Expected ideal path as an ordered list of step kinds, e.g. ['resolve-subject','gather','synthesize','caveat']. The primary structural axis for dedup.

normalized_text.description: Lowercased, entity-masked prompt used for exact-duplicate detection.

coverage_cell.description: The coverage-matrix cell key this scenario fills: '<mode>|<intent>|<difficulty-bucket>'.
